subtasks.description: Query Datadog usage database to extract license allocation counts, actual consumption metrics (hosts monitored, events ingested, custom metrics), and time-series usage data across a rolling period to identify growth patterns and variance between allocated vs. actual usage
Retrieve current Datadog license configuration and seat allocation from operational state store (MongoDB), including product tiers, reserved capacity, and contract terms

Reconcile license allocations against actual usage metrics and growth trends; classify utilization posture (over-provisioned, fully-utilized, under-provisioned); identify growth acceleration/deceleration patterns; generate optimization recommendations based on allocation-to-usage variance

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks required: (1) sql_gen (mid) to fetch historical usage and growth metrics from the data warehouse with time-series aggregation—this requires multi-table joins across usage, allocation, and metrics tables; (2) mongo_query (small) to retrieve current state configuration from the operational store—straightforward document retrieval; (3) cross_recon (frontier) to reconcile the two sources, identify utilization variance patterns, classify provisioning posture, and generate nuanced recommendations. The frontier tier is necessary for cross_recon because it must synthesize multi-signal data (allocation vs. actual), detect growth patterns, and produce actionable insights requiring inference across multiple dimensions.

output.sql: SELECT cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter, cf.event_date, cf.publisher, cf.product, cf.event_type, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.license_id) AS license_count, SUM(cf.daily_active_seats) AS total_allocated_seats, SUM(cf.amount_usd) AS total_amount_usd, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.user_id) AS distinct_users, AVG(cf.daily_active_seats) AS avg_daily_active_seats, MAX(cf.daily_active_seats) AS max_daily_active_seats, MIN(cf.daily_active_seats) AS min_daily_active_seats, SUM(cf.daily_active_seats) - LAG(SUM(cf.daily_active_seats)) OVER (PARTITION BY cf.publisher, cf.product, cf.event_type ORDER BY cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter) AS seat_growth_vs_prev_quarter, ROUND(100.0 * (SUM(cf.daily_active_seats) - LAG(SUM(cf.daily_active_seats)) OVER (PARTITION BY cf.publisher, cf.product, cf.event_type ORDER BY cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter)) / NULLIF(LAG(SUM(cf.daily_active_seats)) OVER (PARTITION BY cf.publisher, cf.product, cf.event_type ORDER BY cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter), 0), 2) AS seat_growth_pct, SUM(SUM(cf.daily_active_seats)) OVER (PARTITION BY cf.publisher, cf.product ORDER BY cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter ROWS BETWEEN 3 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rolling_4qtr_seats, AVG(SUM(cf.amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY cf.publisher, cf.product ORDER BY cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter ROWS BETWEEN 3 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rolling_4qtr_avg_spend, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.event_date) AS active_days_in_period FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.publisher ILIKE '%datadog%' AND cf.event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '2 years' GROUP BY cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter, cf.event_date, cf.publisher, cf.product, cf.event_type ORDER BY cf.publisher, cf.product, cf.event_type, cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter, cf.event_date
